description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white, with large rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The property is surrounded by lush landscaping, including a row of palm trees, dense shrubs, and a manicured lawn. A paved driveway leads to a garage area, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small porch and steps. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back slightly from the lower, creating a tiered effect. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and lush landscaping, featuring a driveway and a small porch entry.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the side of the house with a row of palm trees, dense greenery, and a partial view of the driveway.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade, highlighting the main entrance, porch, and a symmetrical arrangement of shrubs and trees.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the opposite side with the garage, driveway, and a clear view of the main entry steps and porch.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the rear of the house, with a flat wall, minimal windows, and a landscaped garden bed.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a simple modern door, flanked by landscaping and minimal decorative elements.
